name: Only Filtering One Instance of a Special Element
description: The product filters only a single instance of a special element from upstream data before passing it downstream. This incomplete filtering allows attackers to include multiple instances of dangerous patterns, with all but the first bypassing the filter.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides data with repeated special elements that flows through a CONTROL node (single-instance filter without global flag) to an EGRESS or TRANSFORM node where remaining unfiltered instances persist.
